Module.name: psModuleForeignAdImport_NuestroDiario
Module.Sql: SELECT ID FID , regionalName2 GeoFID , customer Customer , product Product , regionalType ProductCategoryFID , positionName PlacementComment , publication_date CoverDate , CONCAT(width, 'x', height, '-', grid) FormatFID , inches_width Width , inches_high Height , printColorDescription ColorFID , version_name Slogan , meanPaymentName AccountFID , Username Creator , positionName Note , subtotal AdRate , state StatusFID , orderNumber PrintSystemFID , regionalName , printColorDescription , position , regionalName2 , regionalType , positionName , rate , observations FROM vw_pauta_dataplan WHERE publication_date='%tF' #dpRevision.FirstDayOfSale

Module.name: psModuleForeignAdExport_NuestroDiario
Module.deleteSql: UPDATE sales.ad_order_detail SET position='' ,page_number=0 WHERE publication_date='%tF' #dpRevision.FirstDayOfSale
Module.insertSql: INSERT INTO bitacora_journal.bitacora (product, headline, page_placement) VALUES ('%PN', '%PI', '%PA');
